top_stances.summary: Support extending FISA authorities for national security intelligence operations.
top_stances.source_excerpt: YEA on S. 4465: A bill to amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978
top_stances.track_record_note: Voted YEA on s4465-119 extending FISA authorities.

top_stances.summary: Support improving rural healthcare access and emergency reporting infrastructure.
top_stances.track_record_note: Voted YEA on hr2493-119 (rural healthcare reauthorization), hr5201-119 (Kari's Law), and hr5200-119 (emergency reporting).
